reason: Showing the target drive's free space is a functional addition to the existing confidence chip, not a redesign. The diff only appends a second line (e.g. 'C: 12.3 GB free') to the chip text already shown while a drag hovers a folder target, computed from DriveInfo and cached per drive root for a few seconds so it doesn't hit the disk each frame. Wheel geometry, colours, animations, the chip's look and layout are untouched. The rest of the diff is the FreeSpaceLine/FormatBytes helpers and a test. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
